title: glTF File Reference
description: File data used as a resource in the glTF file. Files **MAY** be referenced by an URI (or IRI) or a buffer view index.

bufferView.description: The index of the bufferView that contains the file data. This field **MUST NOT** be defined when `uri` is defined.

mimeType.description: The file's media type. This field is required **MUST** be defined always.

uri.description: The URI (or IRI) of the file.
uri.gltf_detailedDescription: The URI (or IRI) of the file.  Relative paths are relative to the current glTF asset.  Instead of referencing an external file, this field **MAY** contain a `data:`-URI. This field **MUST NOT** be defined when `bufferView` is defined.
